fountain.name: Stone Fountain
fountain.description: A weathered stone fountain with clear, flowing water.

notice_board.name: Village Notice Board
notice_board.description: A wooden board where villagers post messages and requests.

furnace.name: Furnace
furnace.description: A blazing furnace used to heat metal for forging.

mortar.name: Mortar and Pestle
mortar.description: A sturdy mortar and pestle used to grind herbs, minerals, and other ingredients.

saw_table.name: Saw Table
saw_table.description: A large woodworking table fitted with a saw for cutting timber into useful shapes.

workbench.name: Workbench
workbench.description: A well-used workbench covered with tools, marks, and signs of countless projects.

forge.name: Blacksmith Forge
forge.description: A roaring coal forge, hot enough to melt iron.

anvil.name: Blacksmith Anvil
anvil.description: A heavy iron anvil, scarred from countless hammer blows.

weapon_rack.name: Weapon Rack
weapon_rack.description: A wooden rack displaying various weapons.

bar.name: Tavern Bar
bar.description: A long wooden bar, polished smooth by years of use.

tables.name: Tavern Tables
tables.description: Rough-hewn wooden tables where patrons relax.

fireplace.name: Tavern Fireplace
fireplace.description: A large stone fireplace, a warm glow emanating from within.

stalls.name: Market Stalls
stalls.description: Various market stalls displaying goods for sale.

crates.name: Market Crates
crates.description: Wooden crates filled with fresh produce and other goods.
